519.reason: [Error: LBRACKNode represents '[' but should use LBRACENode for '{' when parsing brace-enclosed initializer list]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: LBRACKNode represents '[' but should use LBRACENode for '{' when parsing brace-enclosed initializer list]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: LBRACKNode represents '[', but here we are parsing '{' which should use LBRACENode]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Should be LBRACENode because LBRACE token corresponds to curly brace '{', not square bracket '[']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: LBRACKNode represents '[', but here we are parsing '{' which should use LBRACENode]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When encountering LBRACE '{', should create LBRACENode instead of LBRACKNode which corresponds to '['. This will cause incorrect token output and potential parsing errors for brace-enclosed initializers.]
